info.name: LMS — Calendar (v1)
info.description:
Calendar / event APIs for the student & teacher app. Events are organization-scoped and exclude cancelled-then-filtered rows.

Endpoints:
- `POST /calendar/events` — paginated event list within a date range, with optional filters.
- `GET /calendar/events/today` — today's events (flat).
- `GET /calendar/events/{id}` — full details for a single event (used by the app's View Event screen).

Auth: Sanctum bearer token in `authToken`.

request.description:
Returns events for the authenticated user's organization within a date range, paginated.

All body fields are OPTIONAL:
- `start_date` / `end_date` (`Y-m-d`) — defaults to today → +1 month
- `event_type` — one of `class`, `exam`, `meeting`, `event`, `holiday`
- `is_all_day` — boolean
- `teacher_detail_id`, `standard_id`, `section_id`, `subject_id` — academic filters
- `limit` (1–100, default 50), `page` (default 1)

Response: `{ events[], pagination, filters }`. Each event carries `id`, `title`, `description`, `date`, `start_time`, `end_time`, `is_all_day`, `event_type`, `color`, `location`, and `academic_details`.

Today's events for the user's organization, ordered by start/end time. Returns a flat `events[]` with a friendly `time` string plus `subject`, `teacher`, and `location`. `per_page` is optional (default 20).

Full details for a single event, scoped to the user's organization. Powers the app's **View Event** screen (opened by tapping an event in the calendar).

Returns: `id`, `title`, `description`, `date`, `start_time`, `end_time`, `is_all_day`, `event_type`, `color`, `is_cancelled`, `cancellation_reason`, `timing_display`, `location { room_number, building, location, full_address }`, and `academic_details { standard, section, subject, teacher { id, name, email } }`.

Posted By: `creator_name`, `creator_email`, and `creator_avatar` (full URL of the creator's profile image, falling back to the school/organization logo, or `null` when neither is set).

**404** if the event does not exist or belongs to another organization.
